mapper.select: SELECT * FROM item_values WHERE item_id = #{itemId}::uuid ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT iv.* FROM item_values iv INNER JOIN items i ON iv.item_id = i.id WHERE i.board_id = #{boardId}::uuid ORDER BY iv.updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM item_values WHERE item_id = #{itemId}::uuid AND column_id = #{columnId}::uuid
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO item_values (id, item_id, column_id, value_text, value_number, value_date, value_json, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{itemId}::uuid, #{columnId}::uuid, #{valueText}, #{valueNumber}, #{valueDate},
#{valueJson}::jsonb NULL ,
#{updatedBy}::uuid NULL , COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) ) ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT item_values_item_id_column_id_key DO UPDATE SET value_text = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.value_text, item_values.value_text), value_number = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.value_number, item_values.value_number), value_date = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.value_date, item_values.value_date), value_json = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.value_json, item_values.value_json), updated_by = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.updated_by, item_values.updated_by), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE item_values SET value_text = #{valueText}, value_number = #{valueNumber}, value_date = #{valueDate}, value_json = #{valueJson}::jsonb NULL , updated_by = #{updatedBy}::uuid NULL , updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
